creator: franco@opnsense.org
text:
The error is from py-crpytography and appears to refer to FreeBSD specific setup of OpenSSL in base and ports alike that the user did not make a mistake with: 

https://cryptography.io/en/latest/openssl/#legacy-provider-in-openssl-3-x

It might be better to fix it at the source port.  A lot of ports depend on it and that would be an uphill battle.

python@ is subscribed. I don't mean to hijack this PR but I couldn't find another one yet and I didn't want to create one myself for the same topic.


Cheers,
Franco
